---
title: "Mobile Architecture"
---

## Directory Structure

```
mobile/
├── app/                              # Expo Router screens
│   ├── _layout.tsx                   # Root layout (Tabs + QueryProvider)
│   ├── index.tsx                     # Home: generate meme
│   ├── result.tsx                    # Result: view + share
│   ├── gallery.tsx                   # History of generated memes
│   └── settings.tsx                  # API key, resolution, about
├── src/
│   ├── features/meme/               # Domain logic
│   │   ├── geminiTypes.ts            # API request/response types
│   │   ├── geminiClient.ts           # REST API client
│   │   └── memeService.ts            # Generate + save orchestrator
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   └── useSecureStorage.ts       # API key in expo-secure-store
│   ├── stores/
│   │   ├── memeStore.ts              # Zustand: generation state + history
│   │   └── settingsStore.ts          # Zustand: user preferences
│   └── utils/
│       ├── colors.ts                 # KaosMaps brand tokens
│       └── constants.ts              # App config, API URLs, defaults
├── global.css                        # Tailwind imports
├── tailwind.config.js                # KaosMaps theme
├── app.json                          # Expo config
├── eas.json                          # EAS Build profiles
└── jest.config.js                    # Multi-project Jest config
```

## Root Layout

The root `_layout.tsx` provides:

1. **TanStack Query** client with 5-minute stale time and 2 retries
2. **Tab navigation** with 4 screens and Lucide icons
3. **KaosMaps dark theme** tab bar (dark background, cyan active tint)

```tsx
export default function RootLayout() {
  return (
    <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
      <StatusBar style="light" />
      <Tabs screenOptions={{
        tabBarActiveTintColor: colors.brand.cyan,
        tabBarStyle: {
          backgroundColor: colors.surface.secondary,
        },
      }}>
        <Tabs.Screen name="index" options={{
          title: "Generate",
          tabBarIcon: ({ color, size }) => <Sparkles color={color} size={size} />,
        }} />
        {/* ... result, gallery, settings */}
      </Tabs>
    </QueryClientProvider>
  );
}
```

## Testing Architecture

Two Jest projects handle different test needs:

| Project | Runner | Scope |
|---------|--------|-------|
| `unit` | ts-jest | Pure TS: utils, stores, services, API types |
| `components` | jest-expo | React Native components (TSX) |

This separation avoids jest-expo's heavyweight setup for pure logic tests, keeping the test suite fast (~2 seconds for 49 tests).
